backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing IP record registration and querying (with pagination, title/hash search, category/jurisdiction filtering), user profile management, and role-based access control via mixed-in authorization and blob storage modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the admin token gate was removed from the frontend, making the app fully publicly accessible without any caffeineAdminToken URL fragment check.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with the IPGT page title, favicon pointing to the generated logo asset, and a root div that mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for Home, Register IP, IP Database, and Whitepaper inside a shared Layout, with stored admin tokens cleared on load to ensure fully public access.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the IPGT brand, platform navigation links, a feature list, dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the IPGT logo and nav links for Home, Register IP, IP Database, and Whitepaper — no authentication controls present.
frontend/src/components/IPCard.tsx: Clickable card component displaying an IP record's category badge, title, description, jurisdiction, registration date, document hash, and an optional truncated SHA-256 hash in gold monospace text.
frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.ts: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about an IP record, including metadata fields, document hash, and simulated cross-chain transaction data for Ethereum and Solana.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A simple layout wrapper component that renders a full-height page with a Header, Footer, and main content area.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: An empty file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationSucc: A modal shown after successful IP registration, displaying the new IP record ID, ICP canister confirmation, and simulated cross-chain transaction details for Ethereum and Solana.
frontend/src/components/TokenStats.tsx: A stub component that renders nothing, kept to avoid breaking imports after the token system was removed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching, searching, filtering IP records, registering IPs, and managing user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for the dark navy/gold theme, and adds utility classes and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx: A placeholder page component that renders nothing.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page for IP Global Terminal featuring a hero section, a three-step 'How It Works' guide, and feature highlights with links to register IP and explore the database.
frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx: Searchable and filterable IP records database page that displays pre-seeded mock blockchain IP records in a paginated card grid with a detail modal.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx: IP registration form page that accepts title, description, category, jurisdiction, and an optional file, computes a SHA-256 hash, and submits the record to the blockchain backend.
frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx: Scrollable whitepaper page with a sticky table-of-contents sidebar, intersection-observer-based active section tracking, and a print-to-PDF button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility that previously extracted an admin token from the URL; now always returns null to make the app fully publicly accessible without any token requirement.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palettes (gold, navy, charcoal), typography/container-query plugins, and design tokens mapped to CSS custom properties.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the current version, architectural notes, and a pending feature request to remove the admin token gate for public URL access.
